metadata.name: hubspot__daily_ticket_history
metadata.comment:
Each record represents a ticket's day in Hubspot with tracked properties from THE `TICKET_PROPERTY_HISTORY` source table pivoted out into columns. Enabled by setting `hubspot_service_enabled` to `True`.
By default, tracks the ticket's pipeline, pipeline stage, and state. Additional properties can be tracked by configuring the `hubspot__ticket_property_history_columns` variable.
The start of a ticket's history is its creation date, and its end is by default the close date (or the current date if still open). The history of ticket can be extended past its close date by configuring the `ticket_history_extension_days` variable.

ticket_day_id.name: ticket_day_id
ticket_day_id.comment: Unique surrogate key hashed on `source_relation`, `date_day`, and `ticket_id`.

date_day.name: date_day
date_day.comment: Date on which the ticket had these values.

ticket_id.name: ticket_id
ticket_id.comment: Unique id of a ticket in Hubspot.

ticket_state.name: ticket_state
ticket_state.comment: State of the ticket based on its pipeline stage. Either OPEN or CLOSED.

hs_pipeline_label.name: hs_pipeline_label
hs_pipeline_label.comment: The human-readable label for the ticket pipeline. The label is used when showing the pipeline in HubSpot.

hs_pipeline_stage_label.name: hs_pipeline_stage_label
hs_pipeline_stage_label.comment: The human-readable label for the ticket's stage. The label is used when showing the stage in HubSpot.

hs_pipeline_stage.name: hs_pipeline_stage
hs_pipeline_stage.comment: ID of the ticket pipeline stage.

has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

primary_team_id.name: primary_team_id
primary_team_id.comment: ID of the user's primary team.

role_id.name: role_id
role_id.comment: ID of the role assigned to the user.

_fivetran_synced.name: _fivetran_synced
_fivetran_synced.comment: Timestamp of when Fivetran synced a record.

is_deleted.name: is_deleted
is_deleted.comment: Boolean indicating whether a record has been deleted in Hubspot and/or inferred deleted in Hubspot by Fivetran; _fivetran_deleted and is_deleted fields are equivalent.
